commit.message: feat(mvp): добавить серверную детализацию урока N1
commit.pr_title: feat(mvp): добавить серверную детализацию урока N1

pr_body_ru:
## Цель
- Продолжить learning delivery после verified N1 route/progress summary.
- Дать mounted `/profile/session` backend-owned read-only N1 lesson detail после diagnostic submit -> route-progress -> N1 start/resume.

## Что сделано
- Добавлен `GET /api/v1/learning/me/lessons/{lessonId}` под profile-session bearer auth.
- Endpoint N1-only, no-body, read-only, gated by submitted N1 diagnostic handoff + existing `N1 STARTED` progress.
- OpenAPI и `@finrhythm/api-client` синхронизированы, web использует generated `fetchLearningMeLessonDetail`.
- Mounted continuation больше не использует `syntheticN1LessonFixture` как payload; token остаётся только в mounted component memory.
- Обновлён `docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md` section 7.4 и stage evidence/verdict refs.

## Как проверить
- `cd apps/api && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./mvnw -q -Dtest=LearningProgressControllerIT test`
- `cd apps/api && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./mvnw -q verify`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client check:generated`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client check:openapi-drift`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/web test`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/web build`
- `make verify`
- `make test-unit`
- `make test-e2e`
- `make build`
- Fresh verifier PASS: `.agent/stages/mvp/verdicts/MVP-07-n1-lesson-detail-continuation-001.json`

## Риски и примечания
- Full MVP-06, full MVP-07, MVP stage and human gates remain open.
- Не добавлены final scoring, R1-R6, HR reports, analytics/events, points/rewards, learning completion, quiz/practice submission, advice, exact sensitive data or customer brand.
- Browser plugin was unavailable; verifier used repository Playwright/Chrome smoke fallback.
